human.name: Human
human.description: Versatile and adaptable, humans thrive in any environment.

passive_abilities.name: Adaptable
passive_abilities.description: Humans' versatility grants a small bonus to all stats.

elf.name: Elf
elf.description: Graceful and long-lived, with an affinity for nature and magic.

dwarf.name: Dwarf
dwarf.description: Stout and sturdy, renowned for craftsmanship and resilience.

halfling.name: Halfling
halfling.description: Small and nimble, with a knack for stealth and good fortune.

passive_abilities.name: Lucky
passive_abilities.description: Halflings have an uncanny knack for avoiding danger.

orc.name: Orc
orc.description: Powerful and fierce, with unmatched strength and endurance.

passive_abilities.name: Berserker Blood
passive_abilities.description: Orcs gain bonus damage when badly wounded.

gnome.name: Gnome
gnome.description: Clever and curious, with an inventive spirit and sharp wit.

half-elf.name: Half-Elf
half-elf.description: Blending human adaptability with elven grace.

dragonborn.name: Dragonborn
dragonborn.description: Proud and draconic, bearing the blood of ancient dragons.

active_abilities.name: Breath Weapon
active_abilities.description: Unleash a cone of dragonfire on your enemy.
